description: metadata at exactly the depth-8 boundary. The deepest key sits at depth 8 (still legal). Registry MUST accept this body (assuming all other validations pass). This pins the boundary so registries do not implement an off-by-one closed-interval check (max < 8 instead of max ≤ 8).

L7.L8: this string sits at depth 8 — at the cap, still legal

expected.rule: RFC-ACDP-0002 §3.3 — metadata depth ≤ 8 (inclusive). The cap is `≤ 8`, not `< 8`.
